headline: A Look At Procter & Gamble (PG) Valuation As Recent Share Price Swings Draw Fresh Attention
summary: Why Procter & Gamble (PG) is back on investors’ radar Procter & Gamble (PG) has caught investor attention after recent share price swings, with the stock showing mixed shorter term returns alongside longer term gains and a shift in value metrics. See our latest analysis for Procter & Gamble. PG’s recent 1 day share price gain of 0.51% comes after a softer 7 day share price return of 2.32% and a 30 day share price return of 1.99%. headline: Gillette Venus and Rifle Paper Co. Debut Fourth Design-Driven, Limited-Edition Shave Collection
summary: BOSTON, March 11, 2026--This season, a new shave collection pairs Gillette Venus’s trusted product performance with Rifle Paper Co.’s signature hand-painted florals. Designed to bring beauty to the everyday, the limited-edition collaboration is available exclusively at Target.

headline: What Happens to Dividend Income When the Next Recession Hits
summary: Recession fears have a way of making income investors second-guess everything, and if dividends are paid out of cash flow, and cash flow shrinks during economic downturns, it only seems logical that dividend income will fall right alongside stock prices. This concern is understandable, especially for retirees who depend on those payouts to cover real ... What Happens to Dividend Income When the Next Recession Hits

headline: AMAT and Micron still winning in AI trade despite QQQ and sector weakness
summary: In a choppy market where the AI trade has broadly struggled, one voice cutting through the noise put it simply: “Certain stocks have done well in the AI trade like AMAT, like Micron.” That’s not a hot take. headline: Ex-Stanford Athletes’ Tampon Startup Takes on Growing Market
summary: Amanda Calabrese and Greta Meyer are looking to fix one of the most persistent problems facing women athletes—leaky tampons. With their startup Sequel, the duo has re-engineered the tampon to prevent fluid from escaping around the edges, providing a solution they say could transform the lives of not only athletes but women everywhere. Calabrese and …
